Uses of Class
nl.knaw.dans.lib.dataverse.DataverseException

  • Packages that use DataverseException 
    Package Description
    nl.knaw.dans.lib.dataverse
    Main package for the DANS Dataverse Client Library

    • Uses of DataverseException in nl.knaw.dans.lib.dataverse

      Methods in nl.knaw.dans.lib.dataverse that throw DataverseException 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      DataverseResponse<FileList> DatasetApi.addFile(Path file, FileMeta fileMeta) 
      DataverseResponse<FileList> DatasetApi.addFile(Path file, String metadata) 
      DataverseHttpResponse<FileList> DatasetApi.addFileItem(Optional<File> optDataFile, Optional<String> optFileMetadata)
      At least one of the parameters should be provided.
      DataverseHttpResponse<DataMessage> DataverseApi.assignDefaultRoleOnDataset(String roleName)
      See Dataverse API Guide.
      DataverseHttpResponse<DataMessage> DataverseApi.assignRole(RoleAssignment roleAssignment)
      See Dataverse API Guide.
      DataverseResponse<RoleAssignmentReadOnly> DatasetApi.assignRole(String roleAssignment)
      See Dataverse API Guide.
      void DatasetApi.awaitLock(String lockType)
      The same as DatasetApi.awaitLock(String, int, int) but with defaults for number of tries and time between tries.
      void DatasetApi.awaitLock(String lockType, int maxNumberOfRetries, int waitTimeInMilliseconds)
      Utility function that lets you wait until a specified lock type is set.
      void DatasetApi.awaitUnlock()
      The same
      void DatasetApi.awaitUnlock(int maxNumberOfRetries, int waitTimeInMilliseconds)
      Utility function that lets you wait until all locks are cleared before proceeding.
